name: top of a tall cypress tree
description: I'm in a top of a tall cypress tree
items_start: Spider web with writing on it
hints: There are important items up here. Examine everything carefully.
The spider web has writing on it - try READing it for a clue. The keys are essential for later.
READ WEB to learn a magic word. GET KEY to take the skeleton keys - you will need them to unlock a door underground.
notes: Reached by CLIMBing the cypress tree in the swamp (room 1). Contains the skeleton keys needed to unlock the door in room 5, and a spider web whose writing reveals the magic word AWAY (part of the flying carpet magic).
